name: Hotel Assistant Tool V2 - Search Internal Docs

parameters.jsCode:
const result = $json
const documents = Array.isArray(result.documents) ? result.documents : []
return [{ json: { documents, warnings: result.warnings ?? [], sources: result.sources ?? [{ type: 'drive', name: 'Google Docs: HOTEL_INTERNAL_OPERATIONS_GUIDE' }] } }]
